violations.text: Rhode Island Manager Certified In Food Safety license expired. FMC must re-instate. Application provided during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

The floors in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2024
